name_en: Dynamic Chip Version M11945 Exclusive Real Shot! This Boulogne handbag reinterprets the classic design with Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing a unique style with multiple carrying options. The interior slip pocket easily holds a smartphone, while the woven chain features eye-catching metal hardware. Dimensions: 29×16×9.5cm
